title: Sales Manager Vacancy at WeWork India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at WeWork India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
WeWork India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Sales Manager for our Bhopal operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About WeWork India:
WeWork India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Project Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Professional development and training programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with WeWork India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
